chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-1156/2016, 1836/2016, 2208/2016, 2209/2016, 2339/2016, 3013/2016, 5304/2020, 5655/2020, 5829/2020, 6267/2020, 6588/2020, 6628/2020, 6780/2020, 1678/2021, 2811/2021, 3776/2021, 4262/2021, 4382/2021, 4848/2018, 7875/2017, 7241/2017, _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For direction. 14.09.2021 Khalid Imran, advocate. Ravi Pinjani, advocate. Muhammad Zaheer ul Hassan, advocate. M/S Manzoor Hameed Arain and Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocates for EOBI. Noor Nabi, advocate. ------------- At the outset, learned counsel for the petitioners seek disposal of these petitions in terms of order dated 07.09.2021 passed in C.P Nos. D-4668/2015 & 1917/2017. Order accordingly. Petitioners in C.P Nos.D-4848/2018, 7875/2017, 7241/2017, 2208/2016, 2209/2016 shall deposit amount from September 2021. With regard to statutory raise in contribution under Rule 4 of Contribution Rules EOBI, EOBI shall constitute a committee and shall consider the case of the petitioner with sympathetic consideration. Mr. Manzoor Hameed Arain advocate for EOBI is ready to provide a list. Office shall fix all cases pertaining to EOBI particularly bifurcating in categories that in terms Nazir is receiving contribution that those cases shall be fixed separately with separate cause list and cases wherein contribution is not being paid with the Nazir shall be listed in separate cause list. Office to place a copy of this order in all connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E S.Soomro/P.A
